steps.title: Spot the logical requirement
steps.content: The assertion “31 was NOT the lowest count at any station” demands evidence of a count smaller than 31.

steps.title: Match the data to the assertion
steps.content: Choice C cites 16 barred flagtails at station 3—a count smaller than 31 that proves the claim. The others either misquote the table (A) or cite values larger than 31 (B and D), neither supporting the argument. That matches choice C — C is correct.
